productDisplayName: Puma Women Geranium Red Core Sweatpants
description: Composition Red track pants made of 80% cotton, 20% polyester has a wide elasticated waist band with a drawstring inside, pockets on the sides and cat logo embroidered on the left thigh Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold Wash separately with like colours Do not use softeners, do not bleach Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron Get more out of your work outs and yoga sessions with this flattering pair of tracks from puma. The waistband and flared legs flatter most body types while the fabric wicks sweat away and keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with tees and sports footwear for trips to the gym. Model statistics The product has a length of 38.5" on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
